name: Chocolate Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugar, salt, corn syrup, cooled baking chocolate, melted butter, eggs, and vanilla in a bowl.
2. Beat until well blended using an electric mixer set to medium speed.
3. Stir in the pecans and pour into the unbaked pie shell.
4. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 minutes or until set (the pie will be puffy when removed from the oven but will sink slightly while cooling).
5. Cool on a wire rack.
